en: It'll be fine, it's all right, oh my god.
How long will I love you?
As long as stars are above you. Fine.
ko: 별이 너 위에 있는 한? 좋아.

en: Longer if I can. You're a terrible liar.
ko: 내가 할 수 있다면 더 오래.

en: How long will I need you?
As long as the seasons meet too.
I'm taking you wherever I can.
How long will I get to you? As long as I live to.
ko: 내가 너에게 얼마나 갈 수 있을까?

en: How long will I love you?
As long as stars are above you.
